response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 13+ years of polyglot experience and recent exposure to MCP and AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, but the AI/GenAI production track record is only about a year long and the resume does not evidence vector databases, RAG, multi-agent frameworks, or deep cloud-platform AI work required for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role. A screening call could clarify depth of recent agentic work and customer-facing leadership.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js background plus broader polyglot range (Python-adjacent skills, DLang, Java, C/C++)
Current hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq
Track record of building production systems at scale (Dunnhumby millions of req/s, Optilyz pricing pipelines) and public technical leadership via workshops and talks
concerns: Only ~1 year of explicit AI/agent work — far short of the 8+ years of AI-driven solutions the role asks for
No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/observability
Limited evidence of major-cloud AI system design (only brief AWS CDK mention) and no multi-agent framework experience (LangGraph, CrewAI)

key_factors.factor: Insufficient GenAI/RAG/vector-DB depth vs. 8-year AI requirement
Recent MCP and agentic-workflow experience aligns with role
Strong production engineering and TypeScript/Node foundation
